en.name: Level 97 — Lighthouse
en.shortDescription: A fog-shrouded island holding a ruined lighthouse, home to undead entities and ringed by deep, cold saltwater.
en.atmosphere: Perpetual night under thick fog and a crescent moon; an isolating quiet broken only by scattered signs of past tragedy.
en.tips: Avoid the island itself — stay near the boat wreckage. The lighthouse ruins are extremely dangerous; be ready to swim the moment you arrive.
